title: psidium minense
intro: Psidium minense, also known as the Guinean guava, is a species of flowering plant in the myrtle family. This plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Psidium minense include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Psidium minense can be made into teas, infusions, or extracts, and are often used to treat various ailments, including respiratory issues and skin conditions.
